arguments.argument: findTargetX=point_distance(oPlayer1.x,0,x,0) findTargetY=point_distance(0,oPlayer1.y,0,y) if findTargetX<drawRangeX and findTargetY<drawRangeY { if drawType=0 draw_background_part(tileHPF,0,224,64,64,x,y) else if drawType=1 draw_background_part(tileHPF,64,224,64,64,x,y) else if drawType=2 draw_background_part(tileHPF,64,160,64,64,x,y) }
